intent: A high-concurrency e-commerce marketplace engine designed for micro-transactions, providing a streamlined checkout workflow that integrates multi-currency digital wallet processing, automated inventory synchronization, and real-time fraud detection analytics to minimize cart abandonment rates.

entities.name: InventoryLedger
entities.description: An immutable append-only event log maintaining atomic stock increments and decrements to prevent race conditions during high-concurrency checkout.

entities.name: TransactionEscrow
entities.description: A state-machine entity managing the lifecycle of a purchase from pending-authorization to capture, ensuring funds are held until inventory is cryptographically confirmed.

entities.name: FraudSignalMetric
entities.description: A real-time telemetry snapshot capturing user velocity, device fingerprinting, and session anomaly scores to trigger proactive risk mitigation.

entities.name: WalletBalanceProjection
entities.description: A materialized view reflecting the current available liquidity for a user across multiple currencies, optimized for low-latency read operations during checkout.

entities.name: CheckoutOrchestrationSnapshot
entities.description: A transient context object storing the transient state of a shopping session to ensure idempotency if the client request needs to be retried.

entities.name: SKUReservations
entities.description: A short-lived distributed lock record that pins specific inventory items to a user session for a defined TTL to prevent overselling.

entities.name: AuditTrailManifest
entities.description: A secure, hashed record of all state transitions per checkout process, serving as the source of truth for financial reconciliation.

architecture.description: The system utilizes an event-driven microservices architecture where the CheckoutOrchestrationSnapshot initiates a reservation in SKUReservations via a distributed lock. Simultaneously, the FraudSignalMetric service evaluates the request context; upon validation, the TransactionEscrow creates an entry and attempts to commit an atomic mutation to the InventoryLedger. If successful, the system dispatches an event to the message bus, triggering the third-party payment gateway via a secure proxy. The response from the gateway asynchronously updates the TransactionEscrow state, which then pushes a delta update to the WalletBalanceProjection. Finally, all state transitions are hardened in the AuditTrailManifest to ensure PCI-DSS compliance and financial integrity.

endpoints.summary: Record an atomic stock increment or decrement
validation_rules: delta must be a non-zero integer

endpoints.summary: Create or resume a checkout session
Create a short-lived SKU reservation lock
Retrieve the audit trail for a specific checkout

components.content: Form to record stock increments and decrements
Status tracking of TransactionEscrow and SKUReservations
Detailed view of AuditTrailManifest for specific checkouts

rules.description: Ensure SKU reservation TTL is active before permitting InventoryLedger mutation.
rules.logic: If current_time > reservation_expiry, reject transaction. If inventory_request initiated without active SKUReservations lock, trigger rollback.

rules.description: Guarantee atomic updates to inventory via strictly sequential event processing.
rules.logic: All decrements must be validated against the current ledger snapshot to prevent negative stock values.

rules.description: Prevent payment authorization if fraud risk exceeds defined threshold.
rules.logic: If FraudSignalMetric.anomaly_score > threshold, transition TransactionEscrow to 'CANCELLED_BY_RISK' and release SKUReservations lock.

rules.description: Enforce idempotency in checkout process using orchestration snapshot.
rules.logic: Any incoming request with an existing correlation ID in CheckoutOrchestrationSnapshot must return the current state of the transaction rather than initializing a new flow.

rules.description: Maintain audit integrity for financial reconciliation.
rules.logic: Every transition in TransactionEscrow must generate a corresponding cryptographic entry in the AuditTrailManifest prior to updating the WalletBalanceProjection.

rules.description: Validate wallet liquidity before committing transaction capture.
rules.logic: If WalletBalanceProjection available_balance < transaction_total, fail transaction and trigger release of SKUReservations.
